title: ctenopteris subflabelliformis
intro: Ctenopteris subflabelliformis, also known as the fern-leaved ctenopteris or ctenopteris fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ctenopterygiaceae. This plant is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in countries such as Thailand and Malaysia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves of Ctenopteris subflabelliformis contain bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Ctenopteris subflabelliformis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in topical creams or ointments for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
